summary: Iteration 24 testing complete. All 19 backend tests passed. Mobile responsiveness for Admin, Partner, Case Manager dashboards working correctly with hamburger menu, sidebar overlay, and dark backdrop. Client dashboard responsive header working. Email service integration (MOCKED to DB) verified - sale approval/rejection, ticket reply all create email logs correctly. Email logs endpoint admin-only access verified.
